title: Data storage update
description: Updated Data storage, Navigation, Profile, and Sign in. Allow password login without WebAuthn config. Complete FFTS AVS parity sync. Align inherited assets and defaults with Forest Farm. Establish Forest baseline history. Close parity verification gaps. Complete Forest production sanitization. Apply Forest-safe parity schema. Add full Forest product parity. Sync dashboard and field workflows. Add secure Forest access foundation. Make FFTS production-only.
summary: Updated Data storage, Navigation, Profile, and Sign in. Allow password login without WebAuthn config. Complete FFTS AVS parity sync. Align inherited assets and defaults with Forest Farm. Establish Forest baseline history. Close parity verification gaps. Complete Forest production sanitization. Apply Forest-safe parity schema. Add full Forest product parity. Sync dashboard and field workflows. Add secure Forest access foundation. Make FFTS production-only.
